verbGlossary.QUANTIFIED BY: {source} quantities are derived from {target}-based quantity takeoffs rather than manual measurement
verbGlossary.PRICED FROM: {source}is based on quantities extracted from {target} takeoff
verbGlossary.VALIDATED AGAINST: {source} compares submitted quantities and pricing to {target} takeoff to identify discrepancies
verbGlossary.SCOPED TO: {source} work scope is defined by specific {target} elements assigned to that trade contractor
verbGlossary.PROCURES: {source} acquires materials or equipment corresponding to specific elements in the building {target}
verbGlossary.DEFINED BY: {source} boundaries are defined by {target} elements included in the contractor's package
verbGlossary.REFERENCED FROM: {source} instrument references the 3D building information model as part of {target} documents
verbGlossary.SPECIFIED AT: {source} requires {target} elements to be developed to a minimum level of development (LOD) for fabrication or coordination
verbGlossary.INFORMED BY: {source} scope is refined based on {target} results that reveal coordination requirements between trades
verbGlossary.ADJUSTED FOR: {source} is modified to address {target}s identified during BIM review sessions
verbGlossary.VERIFIED AGAINST: {source} is confirmed by comparing installed conditions to the as-built {target}
verbGlossary.DELIVERED WITH: {source}document package includes the as-built {target} as a required deliverable
verbGlossary.ISSUED WITH: {source} is distributed with {target}-based drawings as part of the bidding documents
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED WITH: Request for proposal includes {target}-based drawings for bidders to review and price from
verbGlossary.OBLIGATED TO: {source} requires the trade contractor to participate in BIM coordination meetings as a contractual obligation
verbGlossary.ACCELERATED BY: {source} cycle time is shortened when BIM coordination adoption provides clearer scope and fewer ambiguities
verbGlossary.CORRELATED WITH: {source} change order rate is analyzed relative to {target} density to assess design coordination effectiveness
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED BY: {source} requirements are verified through drone-captured site condition documentation
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED BY: {source} phasing and procurement timing follows {target} construction sequence
